message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor white
    BorderThickness 1
}

rectangle "A" as A <<Rectangle>> 
rectangle "B" as B <<Rectangle>> 

' Define custom arrow style for solid line with filled triangle head
sprite $filledTriangleHead [width=8 height=6] {
0FFFFF7
00FFF3E
0FFFE4C
FFFFFFFF
0FFE529
00FFD17
0FDDB05
}

style node {
    LineStyle plain
    ArrowSize 10
    HeadShape TriangleFilled
}

% Top row connections to middle section using dashed lines without arrows
A -[dashed]-> M : ""  
B -[dashed]-> N : ""  

M --> P : "<<solid\narrowhead>>"   
N ..> Q : "<<open\ndiamond>"   

P -- C    
Q -- D    

@enduml
